data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified navigation paths to reduce decision-making time for users.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu structures with concise options.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements positioned for intuitive user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Prominently placed CTAs for easy access and reduced interaction time.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Information is chunked into digestible portions to aid memory retention.
data.technical_spec: Content sections limited to 7±2 items to avoid cognitive overload.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design enhances user satisfaction and perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of branding elements and a modern design aesthetic.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design adheres to user expectations by mirroring standard web design practices.
data.technical_spec: Familiar navigation conventions and interface elements throughout.
